MINI MINUTES: Judge A. James Robertson II; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Catholic Charities CYO is present. Represented by Colleen McCarthy.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Tyrone Dushawn Collins and Gail Marie Collins are present.
Attorney H. Allison Elmore representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of OCT-22-2012 is vacated.
